subject: Project pulse: round table execution in Canberra | Frida Kahlo | Q2 review | INIT-1213
body: Intelligence from Canberra indicates a growing marsupial intent to take over urban zones under the round table banner. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Frida Kahlo and Alexander Fleming. Reference initiative INIT-1213. A revised timeline will be circulated after feedback is collected. Tracking tags: ops, coffee.
